evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 39111326. 2024/08/27 00:00. BACKGROUND: This study compared the plan quality and dosimetric parameters of 
single-fraction (SF) MR-LINAC (MRL)-based stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT) 
w
evidence.source_title: Commissioning of MRI-guided gynaecological brachytherapy using an MR-linac.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 39111326. 2024/08/27 00:00. BACKGROUND: This study compared the plan quality and dosimetric parameters of 
single-fraction (SF) MR-LINAC (MRL)-based stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT) 
with delivered high-dose-rate interstitial brachytherapy (HDR-iBT) for 
colorectal liver metastases (CRLM).
METHODS: Between August 2017 and March 2019, 26 patients with a total of 45 CRLM 
were treated in 28 sessions using HDR-iBT with 1 × 25 Gy and were 
retrospectively included in this study. For
evidence.search_query: MR-LINAC brachytherapy technical aspects online adaptive planning
